Package org.apache.juneau.marshall

Annotation Interface Marshalled

@Documented @Target(TYPE) @Retention(RUNTIME) @Inherited public @interface Marshalled
Annotation that can be applied to classes to control how they are marshalled.

Carries the marshalling-only attributes for a class — bean-modeling attributes (such as properties, excludeProperties, findFluentSetters, interfaceClass, stopClass, propertyNamer, unsorted, factory, etc.) live on @BeanType in juneau-commons.

Can be used in the following locations:

  • Bean classes and parent interfaces.
  • Non-bean marshalled classes.
  • @Rest-annotated classes and @RestOp-annotated methods when used with @MarshalledApply.
See Also:
  • @Marshalled Annotation

  • Element Details

    • as

      MarshalledAs as
      Specifies the marshalling strategy for this type.

      Defaults to MarshalledAs.DETECT (auto-detection). Use MarshalledAs.STRING to serialize via toString() and deserialize via fromString/valueOf/single-String constructor — equivalent to the former MarshallingStringSwap pattern.

      Returns:
      The marshalling strategy.
      Default:
      DETECT

    • description

      String[] description
      Optional description for the exposed API.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Since:
      9.2.0
      Default:
      {}

    • summary

      String summary
      Short, concise summary of the exposed API.

      Intended as a brief, single-line description suitable for AI/LLM consumption, compact documentation, or any context where brevity matters. See Schema.summary() for the canonical definition; this field is the type-level counterpart.

      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Since:
      10.0.0
      Default:
      ""

    • dictionary

      Class<?>[] dictionary
      Bean dictionary.

      The list of classes that make up the bean dictionary for all properties in this class and all subclasses.

      See Also:
      • MarshalledProp.dictionary()
      • MarshalledConfig.dictionary()
      • MarshalledConfig.dictionary_replace()
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanDictionary(Class...)
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      {}

    • calendarFormat

      CalendarFormat calendarFormat
      Calendar wire format override.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      NOT_SET

    • dateFormat

      DateFormat dateFormat
      Date wire format override.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      NOT_SET

      DurationFormat durationFormat
      Duration wire format override.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      NOT_SET

      LocaleFormat localeFormat
      Locale wire format override.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      NOT_SET

      TemporalFormat temporalFormat
      Temporal wire format override.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      NOT_SET

    • timeZoneFormat

      TimeZoneFormat timeZoneFormat
      Time-zone wire format override.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      NOT_SET

      BinaryFormat binaryFormat
      Binary wire format override for byte[] values.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      NOT_SET

    • enumFormat

      EnumFormat enumFormat
      Enum wire format override.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      NOT_SET

    • uuidFormat

      UuidFormat uuidFormat
      UUID wire format override.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      NOT_SET

    • bitSetFormat

      BitSetFormat bitSetFormat
      BitSet wire format override.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      NOT_SET

    • bigNumberFormat

      BigNumberFormat bigNumberFormat
      Big-number wire format override for BigInteger / BigDecimal values.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      NOT_SET

    • booleanFormat

      BooleanFormat booleanFormat
      Boolean wire format override for Boolean / boolean values.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      NOT_SET

    • floatFormat

      FloatFormat floatFormat
      Float / Double non-finite wire format override for Float / Double values.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      NOT_SET

    • currencyFormat

      CurrencyFormat currencyFormat
      Currency wire format override for Currency values.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      NOT_SET

    • classFormat

      ClassFormat classFormat
      Class wire format override for Class values.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      NOT_SET

    • example

      String example
      POJO example.

      Specifies an example of the specified class in Simplified JSON format.

      Examples are used in cases such as POJO examples in Swagger documents.

      Example:

      @Marshalled(example="{foo:'bar'}") public class MyClass {...}

      Notes:
      • Setting applies to specified class and all subclasses.
      • Keys are the class of the example.
        Values are JSON 5 representation of that class.
      • POJO examples can also be defined on classes via the following:
        • A static field annotated with @Example.
        • A static method annotated with @Example with zero arguments or one MarshallingSession argument.
        • A static method with name example with no arguments or one MarshallingSession argument.
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • Example
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • periodFormat

      PeriodFormat periodFormat
      Period wire format override.
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      NOT_SET

    • implClass

      Class<?> implClass
      Implementation class.

      For interfaces and abstract classes this method can be used to specify an implementation class for the interface/abstract class so that instances of the implementation class are used when instantiated (e.g. during a parse).

      Example:

      @Marshalled(implClass=MyInterfaceImpl.class) public class MyInterface {...}

      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      void.class

    • interceptor

      Class<? extends BeanInterceptor<?>> interceptor
      Bean property interceptor.

      Bean interceptors can be used to intercept calls to getters and setters and alter their values in transit.

      See Also:
      • BeanInterceptor
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.BeanInterceptor.Void.class

    • typeName

      String typeName
      An identifying name for this class.

      The name is used to identify the class type during parsing when it cannot be inferred through reflection.
      For example, if a bean property is of type Object, then the serializer will add the name to the output so that the class can be determined during parsing.

      It is also used to specify element names in XML.

      Example:

      // Use _type='mybean' to identify this bean. @Marshalled(typeName="mybean") public class MyBean {...}

      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanDictionary(Class...)
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • typePropertyName

      String typePropertyName
      The property name to use for representing the type name.

      This can be used to override the name used for the "_type" property used by the typeName() setting.

      The default value if not specified is "_type".

      Example:

      // Use 'type' instead of '_type' for bean names. @Marshalled(typePropertyName="type") public class MyBean {...}

      See Also:
      • MarshalledConfig.typePropertyName()
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.typePropertyName(String)
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""
